rule_context.rule: VOLATILE + AST tier >= T6 = hard skip regardless of elite playmaker exemption
rule_context.exception_check: iron_floor required for exception at T6; not present at T8 in any case

rule_context.rule: VOLATILE tag on REB at T8; REB T8+ ceiling rule requires 7+/10 which is met, but VOLATILE -5% → 70% which is at the absolute floor. Combined with away context and REB being highest-variance category, honest confidence falls below 78% REB minimum floor.

rule_context.player_role: secondary creator/guard, not team PPG leader
rule_context.rule: AST T4+ on non-primary creator in spread_abs=15.5 blowout — auditor feedback confirms non-primary AST picks in large blowouts structurally underperform; trend=down on AST further compounds risk. Applying blowout secondary scorer AST skip per auditor carry-forward recommendation.
rule_context.blowout_games_ast: 93% historically but auditor confirmed structural model gap for secondary creators in actual blowouts

rule_context.rule: VOLATILE -5% → 65%, below 78% REB minimum floor. Also vs_soft=62% and vs_tough=61% — well below 70% qualifying threshold on defensive splits. Skip on multiple grounds.

rule_context.raw_avgs_ast: below 8.0 (tier=4 stated as best, implying average near or below 4)
rule_context.rule: AST T4+ hard gate: player is non-PG with raw_avgs AST < 8.0 (elite exemption inapplicable), opp_today=tough → gate requires soft. Tough opponent → SKIP. Additionally VOLATILE tag present which would reduce confidence further.
VOLATILE -5% → 65%, below 78% REB minimum floor. Skip.
VOLATILE -5% → 65%, below 78% REB minimum floor. Also vs_soft=64% and vs_tough=62% below 70% qualifying threshold. Skip on multiple grounds.
3PM trend=down AND BLOWOUT_RISK=True → hard skip all 3PM picks including T1. Iron_floor not present on 3PM.
3PM trend=down AND BLOWOUT_RISK=True → hard skip all 3PM picks including T1. VOLATILE tag also present.

REB trend=down: post-miss REB hit rate drops to 62% (lift=0.83). Applying -5% penalty: 80% → 75%, below 78% REB minimum floor. Also min_floor=21.6 < 24 adds further concern for minutes-dependent counting stat. Skip.

VOLATILE -5% → 70%, exactly at floor with no margin. Trend=down on AST. VOLATILE + T4 AST at 75% with trend=down does not meet the 70% floor after penalty with any confidence. At borderline 70% with down trend, skip is appropriate.
rule_context.note: 70% exactly at floor with VOLATILE and trend=down — skip per conservatism
